According to Parasara Venus being glossy and full of rays
produces rains while tenanting Purva and Uttaraphalgum, SvatI,
Visakha, the Bhadrapadas, Ardra, Bhara^i and Pusya. In case
he moves to the north, in the middle or to the south of Rohini, Gitra,
Visakha and Anuradha, he will cause health and happiness, crops
and rainfall to the best advantage, moderate benefit and minimum
advantage respectively of the people. If he moves to the north or
in the middle of Magha and Krttika, he will prove beneficial to
mankind. Similarly his movement in the middle of the Asa^has,
